'''dhadata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadiness|beadiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadiness|beadiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhadata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædætæth|dhædætæth]] || [[word:dhædætæj|dhædætæj]] || [[word:dhædætæsh|dhædætæsh]] || [[word:dhædætæ|dhædætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadadatath|dhadadatath]] || [[word:dhadadataj|dhadadataj]] || [[word:dhadadatash|dhadadatash]] || [[word:dhadadata|dhadadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadatath|dhadatath]] || [[word:dhadataj|dhadataj]] || [[word:dhadatash|dhadatash]] || [[word:dhadata|dhadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadaftath|dhadaftath]] || [[word:dhadaftaj|dhadaftaj]] || [[word:dhadaftash|dhadaftash]] || [[word:dhadaftaf|dhadaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadatatha|dhadatatha]] || [[word:dhadataja|dhadataja]] || [[word:dhadatasha|dhadatasha]] || [[word:dhadataka|dhadataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadatath|dhadatath]] || [[word:dhadataj|dhadataj]] || [[word:dhadatash|dhadatash]] || [[word:dhadata|dhadata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadatathal|dhadatathal]] || [[word:dhadatajal|dhadatajal]] || [[word:dhadatashal|dhadatashal]] || [[word:dhadatakal|dhadatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadatathatha|dhadatathatha]] || [[word:dhadatajaja|dhadatajaja]] || [[word:dhadatashasha|dhadatashasha]] || [[word:dhadataka|dhadataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadatathan|dhadatathan]] || [[word:dhadatajan|dhadatajan]] || [[word:dhadatashan|dhadatashan]] || [[word:dhadatakan|dhadatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadatathaoro|dhadatathaoro]] || [[word:dhadatajaoro|dhadatajaoro]] || [[word:dhadatashaoro|dhadatashaoro]] || [[word:dhadatakaoro|dhadatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
